fullDescription.text: Identifies patterns that could lead to an attacker executing arbitrary code on the system, often due to improper input validation or insecure deserialization.

shortDescription.text: Detects hardcoded or exposed sensitive credentials.

fullDescription.text: Identifies instances where API keys, passwords, or other sensitive credentials might be hardcoded in the source code or exposed through insecure configurations.

shortDescription.text: Detects potentially insecure usage of external APIs.

fullDescription.text: Identifies patterns where external APIs are called without proper authentication, authorization, or secure parameter handling, potentially leading to data leakage or unauthorized actions.

shortDescription.text: Detects potential prompt injection vulnerabilities in AI agent skills.

fullDescription.text: Identifies patterns in skill definitions or documentation that could allow an attacker to manipulate the AI agent's behavior through crafted inputs, bypassing intended safety measures or eliciting unintended actions.
